common.condition_behavior_description: How the state should match on the targeted entities.
common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted entities to trigger on.

is_detected.description: Tests if one or more moisture sensors are detecting moisture.
is_detected.name: Moisture is detected

is_not_detected.description: Tests if one or more moisture sensors are not detecting moisture.
is_not_detected.name: Moisture is not detected

is_value.description: Tests the moisture level of one or more entities.

above.description: Require the moisture level to be above this value.
above.name: Above

below.description: Require the moisture level to be below this value.
below.name: Below

is_value.name: Moisture level

changed.description: Triggers after one or more moisture content values change.

above.description: Only trigger when moisture content is above this value.
above.name: Above

below.description: Only trigger when moisture content is below this value.
below.name: Below

changed.name: Moisture content changed

cleared.description: Triggers after one or more moisture sensors stop detecting moisture.
cleared.name: Moisture cleared

crossed_threshold.description: Triggers after one or more moisture content values cross a threshold.

lower_limit.description: The lower limit of the threshold.
lower_limit.name: Lower limit

threshold_type.description: The type of threshold to use.
threshold_type.name: Threshold type

upper_limit.description: The upper limit of the threshold.
upper_limit.name: Upper limit

crossed_threshold.name: Moisture content crossed threshold

detected.description: Triggers after one or more moisture sensors start detecting moisture.
detected.name: Moisture detected
